scripts.dev:api: cd StudentLife-Phenotyping && env PYTHONPATH=. uv run --no-project --with fastapi --with "uvicorn[standard]" --with torch --with numpy --with pydantic --with python-multipart -m uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n web,api,chat "npm run dev --prefix Frontend" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:backend"
